description_long: This is a round wristwatch with a dark, metallic case and a matching strap, designed for everyday urban wear. The watch face features large, bold Arabic numerals in a contrasting color, making the time easy to read at a glance. The dial is simple, with three hands for hours, minutes, and seconds, and no additional subdials or complications. The strap appears to be a segmented metal bracelet, adding durability and a classic aesthetic. The watch has a smooth, glossy finish, reflecting light subtly across its surfaces. There is a visible brand logo and text on the dial, positioned just below the center.
description: A round, metallic wristwatch with a bold, easy-to-read dial and a segmented metal strap. The design is classic and functional, suitable for urban daily use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile of the watch case and the curvature of the metal strap.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full watch face, large numerals, and central hands, with the strap extending downward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the thin case and the continuous metal strap.
description_view_3: Rear front view similar to view 1, with the watch face and strap visible, but from the opposite direction.
attribute_brand_logo: Text-based logo and brand name located below the center of the dial, in a small, clear font.
attribute_dial_design: The dial features large, bold Arabic numerals at each hour position, with three central hands for hours, minutes, and seconds. The design is straightforward and highly legible, with no subdials or decorative patterns, giving it a utilitarian, classic look.
attribute_strap_type: Segmented metal bracelet, likely stainless steel, with a smooth, polished finish and visible links.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three hands (hour, minute, second) and large Arabic numerals. No additional complications or special features.
